title: dehaasia sumatrana
intro: Dehaasia sumatrana, also known as Sumatran Dehaasia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, native to Sumatra in Indonesia. The plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dehaasia sumatrana include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Dehaasia sumatrana is often prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are consumed orally to harness its therapeutic benefits.
